description: Fast web scraper using Cheerio for HTML parsing. Supports custom page functions, link discovery, and depth control. | 快速网页爬虫，使用 Cheerio 解析 HTML。支持自定义页面函数、链接发现和深度控制。

properties.title: 起始 URL | Start URLs
properties.name: startUrls
properties.description: URLs to start crawling from | 开始爬取的 URL 列表

properties.title: 链接选择器 | Link Selector
properties.name: linkSelector
properties.description: CSS selector for finding links (e.g., a[href]). Leave empty to disable link discovery. | 用于发现链接的 CSS 选择器（如 a[href]），留空禁用链接发现

properties.title: Glob 模式 | Glob Patterns
properties.name: globPatterns
properties.description: Only crawl URLs matching these glob patterns (e.g., https://example.com/blog/*). | 只爬取匹配这些 glob 模式的 URL

properties.title: 排除模式 | Exclude Patterns
properties.name: excludePatterns
properties.description: URL patterns to skip (e.g., /login, /admin, *.pdf). | 要跳过的 URL 模式

properties.title: 最大爬取深度 | Max Depth
properties.name: maxCrawlingDepth
properties.description: Maximum crawl depth (0 = start page only). | 最大爬取深度（0 = 仅起始页）

properties.title: 最大页面数 | Max Pages
properties.name: maxPagesPerCrawl
properties.description: Maximum pages to crawl (0 = unlimited). | 最大爬取页面数（0 = 不限制）

properties.title: 最大并发数 | Concurrency
properties.name: maxConcurrency
properties.description: Maximum concurrent requests. | 最大并发请求数

properties.title: 页面超时(秒) | Page Timeout (secs)
properties.name: pageLoadTimeoutSecs
properties.description: Page load timeout in seconds. | 页面加载超时时间（秒）

properties.title: 重试次数 | Retries
properties.name: maxRequestRetries
properties.description: Maximum retries for failed requests. | 失败请求重试次数

properties.title: 保留 URL Fragment | Keep URL Fragments
properties.name: keepUrlFragments
properties.description: Keep URL fragments (hash) in links. | 保留 URL 中的 Fragment（哈希部分）

properties.title: 忽略 SSL 错误 | Ignore SSL Errors
properties.name: ignoreSslErrors
properties.description: Ignore SSL certificate errors. | 忽略 SSL 证书错误

properties.title: 调试日志 | Debug Log
properties.name: debugLog
properties.description: Enable detailed logging. | 启用详细日志
